zh.Weardley, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾維亞爾德利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ecgfryth of Durham於0973年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，她的父親Aldhun Bishop of Durham15歲，母親Alfgifu England Gunnarsson16歲。她於1006年與Kilvert Ligulfsson De Lumley在英國達勒姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1018年享年45歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德。

zh-hans.Weardley, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾維亞爾德利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ecgfryth of Durham于0973年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，她的父亲Aldhun Bishop of Durham15岁，母亲Alfgifu England Gunnarsson16岁。她于1006年与Kilvert Ligulfsson De Lumley在英国達勒姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1018年享年45岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Durham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the city of Durham, recorded as Dunholm in 1056 and Duram in 1297, named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ (see Down 1) + late Old English holm (from Old Norse holmr ‘island’).

variants.name: Down
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a down or low hill, from Middle English dun(e), doun(e) (Old English dūn) ‘down, low hill’. See also Downer .

English (Devon): possibly in some cases a patronymic from the Old English personal name Dūn, but later names of this origin cannot reliably be distinguished from those originating from the topographic sense. See Dunn 2.

variants.name: Derham
meanings: English: habitational name from Dearham in Cumbria, East and West Dereham in Norfolk, or Dyrham in Gloucestershire, named from Old English dēor ‘deer’ + hām ‘settlement, homestead’, or hamm ‘enclosed land, water meadow’.
Irish (mainly Dublin, Drogheda, and Cork): of English origin, but MacLysaght takes this to be a variant of   Durham  .

historicEvents.title: Vikings Invade England
historicEvents.description: Viking raiders from Scandinavia invaded England in 980. Years later in 991, the English government paid them 10,000 in hopes for peace. The Viking raiders, however, continued to force more money from England.

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

en.lifeSummary: When Ecgfryth of Durham was born in 0973, in Northumberland, England, her father, Aldhun Bishop of Durham, was 15 and her mother, Alfgifu England Gunnarsson, was 16. She married Kilvert Ligulfsson De Lumley in 1006, in Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1018, at the age of 45, and was buried in Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ecgfryth of Durham est née en 0973, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Aldhun Bishop of Durham, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Alfgifu England Gunnarsson, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Kilvert Ligulfsson De Lumley en 1006, à Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1018, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ecgfryth of Durham 0973 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aldhun Bishop of Durham 15 und ihre Mutter Alfgifu England Gunnarsson 16. Sie hat 1006 in Durham, England Kilvert Ligulfsson De Lumley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1018 im Alter von 45 Jahren und wurde in Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ecgfryth of Durham è nata il nel 0973 nel Northumberland, England, sua padre, Aldhun Bishop of Durham, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Alfgifu England Gunnarsson, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Kilvert Ligulfsson De Lumley nel 1006, nel Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1018, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ecgfryth of Durhamが0973年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Aldhun Bishop of Durhamは15歳，母Alfgifu England Gunnarssonは16歳であった。1006年にイギリスダルハムでKilvert Ligulfsson De Lumleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1018年に45歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ecgfryth of Durham(이)가 0973년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aldhun Bishop of Durham(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alfgifu England Gunnarsson(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1006년 영국 뒤람에서 Kilvert Ligulfsson De Lumley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1018년 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ecgfryth of Durham nasceu em 0973, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Aldhun Bishop of Durham, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Alfgifu England Gunnarsson, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Kilvert Ligulfsson De Lumley em 1006, em Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1018, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ecgfryth of Durham родилась в 0973 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Aldhun Bishop of Durham было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Alfgifu England Gunnarsson, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Kilvert Ligulfsson De Lumley в 1006 г. в местности дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1018 г. в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ecgfryth of Durham nació en 0973, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Aldhun Bishop of Durham, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Alfgifu England Gunnarsson, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Kilvert Ligulfsson De Lumley en 1006, en Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1018, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Northumberland, Inglaterra.
